meetingsv1Contact.title: TODO: For v2 of API, we'd like to merge Contact and Attendee into one message type

typeTimeZone.description:
Represents a time zone from the
[IANA Time Zone Database](https://www.iana.org/time-zones).

id.description: IANA Time Zone Database time zone, e.g. "America/New_York".

version.description: Optional. IANA Time Zone Database version number, e.g. "2019a".

formAnswers.title: The order of fields specified here is the order they will be displayed in

v1AvailableTimeSlotsRequest.description: Request message for listing available time slots for booking a meeting of a specific event type.

eventTypeId.description: Required. Identifier for the event type to retrieve available time slots for.

hostUserId.description: Optional. Host user ID; only used for ClientChoice and PriorityRoundRobin event types. Other types use event type's configured hosts.

v1AvailableTimeSlotsRequest.title: AvailableTimeSlotsRequest

v1AvailableTimeSlotsResponse.description: Response containing a list of available time slots for booking.

timeSlots.description: Output only. Ordered list of available time slots in ISO date-time format, in the requested time zone.

v1AvailableTimeSlotsResponse.title: AvailableTimeSlotsResponse

v1BookMeetingExternalRequest.description: Request message for booking a new meeting for a specified event type in a given business.

attendees.description: Required. List of attendees to invite. Each must include at minimum a valid email address or valid phone number based on event type configuration.

comment.description: Optional. Additional notes or description for the meeting; included in calendar invitations.

eventTypeId.description: Required. Unique identifier of the event type to be booked (defines duration, availability, and settings).

hostUserId.description:
Optional. Host user ID. Required for Team event type - ClientChoice and PriorityRoundRobin; ignored for RoundRobin and MultiHost.
Must be one of the event type's configured host user IDs.

location.description: Optional. Location for the meeting. Empty for virtual; physical address for in-person.

start.description: Required. Desired start time of the meeting in UTC. System validates the slot is available.

v1BookMeetingExternalRequest.title: BookMeetingExternalRequest

v1BookMeetingExternalResponse.description: Response containing the details of the successfully booked meeting.

attendeeEmails.description: Output only. List of email addresses for all attendees successfully added to the meeting.

eventTypeId.description: Output only. Unique identifier of the event type that was booked.

location.description: Output only. Location of the meeting. Empty for virtual; physical address for in-person.

meetingEndTime.description: Output only. Scheduled end time of the meeting in UTC.

meetingId.description: Output only. Unique identifier of the booked meeting; use for rescheduling, cancellation, or retrieval.

meetingStartTime.description: Output only. Scheduled start time of the meeting in UTC.

title.description: Output only. Title or subject of the meeting as it appears in calendar invitations.

userId.description: Output only. Unique identifier of the calendar owner (host) for this meeting.

v1BookMeetingExternalResponse.title: BookMeetingExternalResponse

v1EventType.description: Event type configuration describing a bookable meeting type, including duration, location, and host details.

bookingUrl.description: Output only. Public booking URL where attendees can schedule this event type.

calendarType.description: Output only. Type or identifier of the calendar used when booking this event.

description.description: Output only. Optional. Description of the event type, visible in booking experiences.

duration.description: Output only. Duration of the scheduled meeting for this event type.

hostOrderDetails.description: Output only. Ordering or assignment details used to select a host for new bookings.

hostUsers.description: Output only. Users who can host meetings for this event type.

id.description: Output only. Unique identifier of the event type.

isEmailRequired.description: Output only. Whether an attendee email address is required when booking.

isPhoneNumberRequired.description: Output only. Whether an attendee phone number is required when booking.

isVideoConferencingEnabled.description: Output only. Whether video conferencing is enabled.

location.description: Output only. Default location details for the meeting (e.g., address or meeting link).

locationGuidelines.description: Output only. Optional. Additional instructions or guidelines about the meeting location.

name.description: Output only. Name of the event type shown to users and invitees.

v1EventType.title: EventType

v1ExternalCancelMeetingRequest.description: Request message for cancelling an existing meeting.

meetingId.description: Required. Identifier for the meeting to cancel.

v1ExternalCancelMeetingRequest.title: ExternalCancelMeetingRequest

v1ExternalRescheduleMeetingRequest.description: Request message for rescheduling an existing meeting to a new time and/or location. Either start_time or location is required.

location.description: Optional. The new location for the meeting. For virtual meetings, leave empty. For in-person, use physical address.

meetingId.description: Required. Identifier for the meeting to reschedule.

startTime.description: Optional. The new desired start time for the meeting in UTC. Either start_time or location is required.

v1ExternalRescheduleMeetingRequest.title: ExternalRescheduleMeetingRequest

v1ExternalRescheduleMeetingResponse.description: Response containing the updated details of the rescheduled meeting.

endTime.description: Output only. New scheduled end time of the meeting in UTC.

eventTypeId.description: Output only. Identifier of the event type for this meeting.

location.description: Output only. Location of the meeting. Empty for virtual; physical address for in-person.

meetingId.description: Output only. Unique identifier of the rescheduled meeting.

startTime.description: Output only. New scheduled start time of the meeting in UTC.

title.description: Output only. Title or subject of the meeting as it appears in calendar invitations.

v1ExternalRescheduleMeetingResponse.title: ExternalRescheduleMeetingResponse

v1FormFieldType.description:
- FORM_FIELD_TYPE_SELECT: Legacy single-select; superseded by FORM_FIELD_TYPE_DROPDOWN.
 - FORM_FIELD_TYPE_MULTIPLE_CHOICE: Multiple choice: guest selects one or more of Field.options.
 - FORM_FIELD_TYPE_DROPDOWN: Dropdown: guest selects exactly one of Field.options.

v1GetUsersRequest.description: Request message for listing users with their meeting configuration status for a given business.
v1GetUsersRequest.title: GetUsersRequest

v1GetUsersResponse.description: Response containing a list of users with their meeting connection status.

users.description: Output only. List of users with their configuration status.

v1GetUsersResponse.title: GetUsersResponse

v1GroupResponse.description: Details of a single group within a business.

bookingUrl.description: Output only. Public URL where users can book meetings with this group.

description.description: Output only. Optional. Description of the group and its purpose.

hexColor.description: Output only. Hex color code used for visual representation of the group.

id.description: Output only. Unique identifier of the group.

name.description: Output only. Display name of the group.

v1GroupResponse.title: GroupResponse

v1GroupsRequest.description: Request message for listing all groups for a given business.
v1GroupsRequest.title: GroupsRequest

v1GroupsResponse.description: Response containing a list of all groups for the specified business.

groups.description: Output only. List of groups available for the specified business.

v1GroupsResponse.title: GroupsResponse

v1ListTeamEventTypesRequest.description: Request message for listing team event types for a given business (paginated).

cursor.description: Optional. Pagination cursor from previous response. Empty for first request.

pageSize.description: Optional. Number of items to return per page. Default/max page size is 50.

v1ListTeamEventTypesRequest.title: ListTeamEventTypesRequest

v1ListTeamEventTypesResponse.description: Response containing a paginated list of team event types.

eventTypes.description: Output only. List of event types available for the specified business.

hasMore.description: Output only. Whether more results are available beyond the current page.

nextCursor.description: Output only. Cursor for next page. Pass to ListTeamEventTypesRequest.cursor. Empty means no more pages.

v1ListTeamEventTypesResponse.title: ListTeamEventTypesResponse

v1ListUserEventTypesRequest.description: Request message for listing event types for a user (personal and team) scoped by partner/business.

userId.description: Required. Unique identifier of the user to get their event types (user must belong to business).

v1ListUserEventTypesRequest.title: ListUserEventTypesRequest

v1ListUserEventTypesResponse.description: Response containing the list of event types accessible for the given user and context.

eventTypes.description: Output only. List of event types (personal and team) the user has access to.

v1ListUserEventTypesResponse.title: ListUserEventTypesResponse

countryCode.title: Numeric country calling code (e.g., 1 for Canada, 91 for India)

nationalNumber.title: The main phone number without the country code

v1ServiceResponse.description: Details of a single service within a business.

bookingUrl.description: Output only. Public URL where users can book meetings for this service.

description.description: Output only. Optional. Description of the service and its purpose.

hexColor.description: Output only. Hex color code used for visual representation of the service.

id.description: Output only. Unique identifier of the service.

name.description: Output only. Display name of the service.

v1ServiceResponse.title: ServiceResponse

v1ServicesRequest.description: Request message for listing all services for a given business.
v1ServicesRequest.title: ServicesRequest

v1ServicesResponse.description: Response containing a list of all services for the specified business.

services.description: Output only. List of services available for the specified business.

v1ServicesResponse.title: ServicesResponse

v1UserResponse.description: User information including meeting connection status.

displayName.description: Output only. Full display name of the user.

isConnected.description:
Output only. Whether the user has active connections to both a calendar provider (Google Calendar, Microsoft Outlook)
and a meeting app (Google Meet, Microsoft Teams, or Zoom). Returns false if either connection is missing or inactive.

userId.description: Output only. Unique identifier of the user (IAM user ID).

v1UserResponse.title: UserResponse

scopes.business-app: Allows the application to manage all features of Business App
scopes.meeting: Allows the application to book and manage meetings for your business(es)

requestBody.description: Request message for listing team event types for a given business (paginated).

post.description: List all groups for a given business.

requestBody.description: Request message for listing all groups for a given business.

requestBody.description: Request message for rescheduling an existing meeting to a new time and/or location. Either start_time or location is required.

post.description: List all services for a given business.

requestBody.description: Request message for listing all services for a given business.

post.description: List personal and team event types for a user.

requestBody.description: Request message for listing event types for a user (personal and team) scoped by partner/business.

post.description: List users for a given business (paginated).

requestBody.description: Request message for listing users with their meeting configuration status for a given business.
